retry_reason: Failure due to block group being read-only is likely persistent for the operation; retrying without waiting for the RO condition to change would not succeed.
contract_summary: This function acquires a nocow_writers reference on a block group, conditionally incrementing the nocow_writers counter if the block group is not read-only. It returns the block group with an additional reference (from btrfs_lookup_block_group) that must be released via btrfs_dec_nocow_writers() when done. If the block group is read-only, it returns NULL after dropping the block group reference. Callers must check the return value and only call btrfs_dec_nocow_writers on non-NULL returns. The operation is protected by the block group's spinlock.
